descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.rationale: fundamental microstructure descriptor controlling mechanical properties

quality.loss_reason: full distribution reduced to single statistic
quality.notes: loses shape information from full size distribution

descriptors.name: grain boundary misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: angular difference between adjacent grain orientations
descriptors.rationale: determines boundary energy and migration behavior

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.rationale: indicates deformation history and anisotropic properties

representation.encoding: real-valued positive number greater than one

quality.loss_reason: averaging erases individual grain morphology variations

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.rationale: controls anisotropic mechanical and physical properties

representation.encoding: texture index J or ODF maximum

quality.loss_reason: full ODF reduced to single intensity metric
quality.truncation_error: complete loss of texture component information

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total boundary area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: affects diffusion pathways and mechanical strengthening

quality.loss_reason: does not distinguish boundary types or topology
quality.notes: largely redundant with grain size information

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total dislocation line length per volume
descriptors.rationale: determines stored energy and work hardening state

quality.loss_reason: loses dislocation type and spatial arrangement
quality.notes: ignores character and interaction of dislocations

descriptors.name: subgrain structure
descriptors.physical_meaning: small angle boundaries within original grains
descriptors.rationale: indicates recovery state and local deformation

representation.encoding: subgrain size and boundary density metrics

quality.loss_reason: statistical moments replace full spatial distributions
quality.notes: loses misorientation angles of subgrain boundaries

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.rationale: driving force for recrystallization and recovery

representation.notes: sum of dislocation and boundary contributions

quality.loss_reason: aggregates multiple defect types into single value

descriptors.name: recrystallization fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: volume fraction of strain-free recrystallized material
descriptors.rationale: tracks thermal processing state and evolution

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one
representation.notes: zero is deformed, one fully recrystallized

quality.loss_reason: loses spatial distribution of recrystallized regions

descriptors.name: grain orientation spread
descriptors.rationale: measures internal grain distortion and recovery

quality.loss_reason: averaging removes spatial variation within grains

descriptors.name: kernel average misorientation
descriptors.physical_meaning: local misorientation averaged over kernel neighborhood
descriptors.rationale: spatially resolved measure of plastic strain

quality.loss_reason: spatial correlations lost in statistical representation
quality.notes: sensitive to measurement noise and step size
